IntroHome.title: AfricanCities AI Services
IntroHome.subtitle: A comprehensive urban diagnosis in less than 10 minutes.
IntroHome.description: AfricanCities AI Services offers a complete urban diagnosis in minutes and an expert urban AI coach available 24/7, enabling African cities to transform their data into fast, reliable, and actionable decisions.

why.title: Why AfricanCities AI Services?
why.subtitle: Because African cities deserve fast and actionable diagnoses.
why.stat1: Massive urbanization that requires immediate planning.
why.stat2: The fastest urban integration challenge in history.
why.stat3: Growth that makes 6-month studies obsolete upon publication.
why.description: Traditional diagnosis is a bottleneck. AfricanCities AI Services is the engine: we analyze hundreds of sources in 10 minutes to prioritize your investments where they really matter.

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: A simple and fast approach to get a complete diagnosis of your city.

step1.title: Target
step1.desc: Select your city and key indicators.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.desc: Our AI processes hundreds of data points in minutes.

step3.title: Visualize
step3.desc: Get an interactive dashboard and a Smart City score.

step4.title: Plan
step4.desc: Simulate scenarios and generate a PDF report.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to diagnose and plan the future of your city.

items.title: Express diagnosis
items.description: Indicators spread across all urban dimensions.

items.title: Smart City Score
items.description: Rating from 0 to 100 with automatic benchmarking against similar cities in Africa. Clear visualization of strengths and areas for improvement.

items.title: PDF Report
items.description: Interactive interface to explore results, plus confidential PDF report ready to share with partners and donors.

items.title: 24/7 AI Chatbot
items.description: Intelligent assistant available 24/7 to answer technical questions, propose adapted strategies and suggest examples of similar cities.

items.title: What-if scenarios
items.description: Simulate the impact of different urban interventions: before/after, estimated costs, affected populations, overall score variation.

items.title: Benchmarking
items.description: Compare your city with other African and international metropolises to identify best practices and opportunities.

items.title: Speed and simplicity
items.desc: Gone are the studies that take 6 months and cost tens of thousands of dollars. With AfricanCities AI, get your complete diagnosis in minutes, at a cost accessible even to the smallest municipalities.

items.title: Preparation of funded projects
items.desc: Donors require solid dossiers with indicators, scenarios and projections. Our platform automatically generates all the necessary elements to build convincing proposals and increase your chances of obtaining funding.

items.title: Capacity building
items.desc: No need to systematically call on external consultants. Your municipal team develops its autonomy and understanding of urban issues thanks to integrated diagnostic, simulation and training tools.

items.title: Monitoring over time
items.desc: Compare your city's evolution year after year. Measure the real impact of your investments. Demonstrate progress to citizens and partners. Adjust your strategy continuously.

hero.subtitle: Play the city. Transform urban infrastructures into interactive platforms.

parcours.title: Our
parcours.p1: <0>AI</0> at the service of African resilience AfricanCities AI Services transforms the complexity of massive urbanization into opportunities for sustainable development. By combining expertise in data science, AI and a human-centered approach, we design technological solutions that eliminate friction in the management of public infrastructures. Our mission is to provide decision-makers with the intelligent tools needed to build resilient, inclusive African cities ready for future generations.
parcours.p2: The multidisciplinary team of AfricanCities AI works hard to mitigate the problems of massive urbanization, reinforcing the crucial role of embedded technologies and smart infrastructures in building our lives in the cities of the future.

expertise.title: World-class multidisciplinary expertise
expertise.description: AfricanCities AI Services is powered by the Center for Urban Systems (CUS) of UM6P, a center of excellence dedicated to urban innovation in Africa.

pillar1.title: +20 high-level experts
pillar1.desc: A multinational team combining AI, statistics, spatial data science, architecture, mobility, digital twin and geomatics.

pillar2.title: Scientific rigor
pillar2.desc: More than 79 scientific publications and 32 international conferences.

pillar3.title: Continental impact
pillar3.desc: 45 case studies and more than 16 strategic projects in Africa carried out in collaboration with the World Bank, OCP Foundation and EPFL.

summary.title: Project
summary.subtitle: AfricanCities AI Services: AI at the service of urban diagnosis for African cities
summary.p1: Africa's rapid urbanization demands smart solutions. Many cities face major challenges in housing, infrastructure and climate, and lack accessible tools to plan effectively.
summary.p2: AfricanCities AI Services offers an innovative AI assistant that provides fast and confidential urban diagnoses. In just 5 minutes, cities can assess their "smart city" potential, receive personalized impact-focused recommendations and compare themselves with similar cities. Our platform includes an interactive dashboard, detailed PDF reports and an urban AI chatbot for strategic analysis and "what-if" scenarios.
summary.p3: This tool provides municipalities with fast, affordable and reliable data, helping them prioritize investments in housing, water, transport and energy. It builds local capacity, improves their visibility for funding and enables progress to be tracked over time.
summary.p4: Our vision is to expand across the continent, creating a unique database of smart African cities and contributing to a continental index of sustainable and inclusive urban development.
summary.p5: AfricanCities AI Services is transforming the way African cities plan and develop, fostering data-driven decisions for a better urban future.
